case_title: KWOK KEN SZETO et al VS. GREGORY MICHAEL ALLEN et al

docket_entries.description: ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUL-07-2009 CONTINUED TO NOV-10-2009 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212. JURISDICTION OF THE ARBITRATOR IS EXTENDED THROUGH OCT-09-2009. ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE ON JUL-07-2009 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
